query:
INSERT INTO crm_contacts (phone, nombre, id_paciente, dni)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.telefono)
    s.telefono,
    s.nombre,
    s.id_paciente::INTEGER,
    p.dni
FROM surgeries s
LEFT JOIN pacientes p ON p.id_paciente = s.id_paciente::INTEGER
WHERE s.telefono IS NOT NULL
  AND s.telefono != ''
  AND s.nombre IS NOT NULL
  AND s.nombre != ''
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM crm_contacts c WHERE c.phone = s.telefono
  )
ORDER BY s.telefono, s.created_at DESC;
